clusters.title: China releases underground church pastor after months in detention

items.title: China releases underground church pastor after months in detention
items.standfirst: Ezra Jin’s family says the Zion Church founder arrived in the US after months in detention in China.
items.content: Ezra Jin’s family says the Zion Church founder arrived in the US after months in detention in China.

items.title: Pastor freed from prison in China weeks after Trump requested his release
items.standfirst: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.
items.content: A pastor of a prominent underground church who was detained in China in October has been released, less than two months after U.S. President Donald Trump brought up his case when meeting Chinese leader Xi Jinping.(Image credit: Ng Han Guan)

items.title: Chinese underground church figure Jin Mingri freed from prison
items.standfirst: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.
items.content: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.

items.title: Founder of prominent underground church released from prison in China
items.standfirst: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’The founder of one of China’s most prominent underground churches has been released from prison and reunited with his family in the United States.Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October. Continue reading...
items.content: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’The founder of one of China’s most prominent underground churches has been released from prison and reunited with his family in the United States.Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Ezra Jin released from detention in China
Jin arrived in the US after months in detention
Trump requested Jin's release from Xi Jinping
Jin is founder of Zion Church in China
Jin reunited with family in the United States

clusters.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
clusters.neutral_headline: Ukrainian Drones Attack Russian Oil Terminal

items.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
items.standfirst: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.
items.content: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.

items.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg oil terminal and nearby port
items.standfirst: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...
items.content: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...

items.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
items.standfirst: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".
items.content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".

ai_summary: Ukrainian drones struck St Petersburg oil terminal
Attack also hit nearby port and surrounding region
No casualties reported in the attack
Ukraine targets Russian infrastructure and revenue
Attack described as large-scale by officials

clusters.title: France to face Morocco in quarter-final showdown
clusters.neutral_headline: France Beats Paraguay in World Cup

items.title: France to face Morocco in quarter-final showdown
items.standfirst: Kylian Mbappe scored from the penalty spot as France overcame searing heat and stubborn defence to beat Paraguay 1-0 and set up a World Cup quarter-final against Morocco on Saturday.
items.content: Kylian Mbappe scored from the penalty spot as France overcame searing heat and stubborn defence to beat Paraguay 1-0 and set up a World Cup quarter-final against Morocco on Saturday.

items.title: France beat Paraguay to reach World Cup quarter-finals
items.standfirst: Kylian Mbappe scored from the penalty spot as France overcame searing heat and stubborn defence to beat Paraguay 1-0 and set up a World Cup quarter-final against Morocco on Saturday.
items.content: Kylian Mbappe scored from the penalty spot as France overcame searing heat and stubborn defence to beat Paraguay 1-0 and set up a World Cup quarter-final against Morocco on Saturday.

items.title: Les Bleus advance to World Cup quarter-finals after bruising win over Paraguay
items.standfirst: Kylian Mbappé scored the only goal of the game from a second-half penalty as France beat Paraguay in a cagey Round of 16 tie in Philadelphia on Saturday. Les Bleus will take on Morocco in the quarter-finals on Thursday in Boston.
items.content: Kylian Mbappé scored the only goal of the game from a second-half penalty as France beat Paraguay in a cagey Round of 16 tie in Philadelphia on Saturday. Les Bleus will take on Morocco in the quarter-finals on Thursday in Boston.

items.title: France-Paraguay : French fans in Philly react to 1-0 score
items.standfirst: 🇫🇷🇵🇾 #France beat #Paraguay 1-0 on Saturday in a frustrating and tense Round of 16 clash, controlling large stretches of the game but needing a Kylian #Mbappé penalty to finally break through. 🎤 Here's what France fans in Philly had to say about the game.
items.content: 🇫🇷🇵🇾 #France beat #Paraguay 1-0 on Saturday in a frustrating and tense Round of 16 clash, controlling large stretches of the game but needing a Kylian #Mbappé penalty to finally break through. 🎤 Here's what France fans in Philly had to say about the game.

items.title: Mbappe draws level with Messi as France beat Paraguay to set up Morocco tie
items.standfirst: Kylian Mbappe moves level with Lionel Messi on seven goals at World Cup 2026 as France beat Paraguay 1-0 in last 16.
items.content: Kylian Mbappe moves level with Lionel Messi on seven goals at World Cup 2026 as France beat Paraguay 1-0 in last 16.

items.title: World Cup 2026: Mbappé sends Les Bleus into quarterfinals after hard-fought win over Paraguay
items.standfirst: France edged past a stubborn and physical Paraguay side thanks to a penalty kick by Kylian Mbappé (1-0), sealing their place in the World Cup 2026 quarterfinals after a frustrating but dominant display. They will take on Morocco on Thursday.
items.content: France edged past a stubborn and physical Paraguay side thanks to a penalty kick by Kylian Mbappé (1-0), sealing their place in the World Cup 2026 quarterfinals after a frustrating but dominant display. They will take on Morocco on Thursday.

items.title: Paraguay–France: Mbappé penalty puts Les Bleus ahead in tense Round of 16 clash
items.standfirst: France edged past Paraguay 1-0 in the Round of 16 of the World Cup 2026, maintaining their perfect tournament record and moving one step closer to another global title. Les Bleus’ dominant group stage performances have established them as genuine contenders, while Paraguay’s resistance was eventually broken by a Kylian Mbappé penalty after a tense and physical contest. Relive our liveblog for minute-to-minute commentary.
items.content: France edged past Paraguay 1-0 in the Round of 16 of the World Cup 2026, maintaining their perfect tournament record and moving one step closer to another global title. Les Bleus’ dominant group stage performances have established them as genuine contenders, while Paraguay’s resistance was eventually broken by a Kylian Mbappé penalty after a tense and physical contest. Relive our liveblog for minute-to-minute commentary.

Kylian Mbappe scored from penalty spot

Mbappe equals Messi's World Cup goal record
France dominated the game but struggled to score

clusters.title: Curtis Young on America's "diffcult moment in the mirror"

items.title: Curtis Young on America's "diffcult moment in the mirror"
items.standfirst: This weekend, the United States marks 250 years since the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, one of the most influential political texts in modern history. Its assertion that governments derive their power from the consent of the governed, and that all people are endowed with the rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness, has inspired democratic movements around the world.
items.content: This weekend, the United States marks 250 years since the adoption of the Declaration of Independence, one of the most influential political texts in modern history. Its assertion that governments derive their power from the consent of the governed, and that all people are endowed with the rights to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness, has inspired democratic movements around the world.

items.title: On the Declaration of Independence
items.standfirst: A July 4 reflection on the Declaration’s radical language and global significance, arguing that its claims about equality, unalienable rights, consent of the governed, and the right to alter or abolish unjust government helped reshape modern politics far beyond the United States. [acoup.blog]
items.content: A July 4 reflection on the Declaration’s radical language and global significance, arguing that its claims about equality, unalienable rights, consent of the governed, and the right to alter or abolish unjust government helped reshape modern politics far beyond the United States. [acoup.blog]

ai_summary: US celebrates 250 years since Declaration signing
Declaration influenced democratic movements globally
Document asserts government power from consent
Rights to life and liberty endorsed in Declaration
Global significance of the Declaration acknowledged

clusters.title: China's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks
clusters.neutral_headline: China Promotes New Generals After Purge

items.title: China's military promotes 2 new generals after anti-corruption purge thins ranks
items.standfirst: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping.
items.content: The shake-up is believed to be an effort to ensure the military's loyalty to the Communist Party and its leader, Xi Jinping. (Image credit: Li Gang)

items.title: Xi Replaces Anti-Corruption Leader in Purge of China’s Army
items.standfirst: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.
items.content: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.

ai_summary: China's military promotes two new generals
Purge aims to ensure loyalty to Communist Party
Xi Jinping leads the anti-corruption efforts
Military purge is the largest in half a century
New generals appointed to key positions
